modal.bannerHintRequired: Required. JPG, PNG or WebP. Max 5MB.
modal.bannerHintReplace: Upload a new image to replace the current banner.
modal.bannerHintOptional: Optional. Upload an image to set or replace the banner.
modal.depositRequired: Parking fee is required (see details below).
modal.capacityHint: Maximum capacity is {{max}} people for event management (Main Hall)
modal.hostingHint: Enter the name(s) of the project(s) hosting this event
modal.eventLinkHint: Optional. Link to event page (e.g. Lu.ma, Eventbrite)
modal.eventHallDeposit: Parking fee is required (see details below).
modal.amenityHint: Amenity will be booked 1 hour before and 2 hours after event
modal.depositSectionDescription: Events with more than 30 attendees require a deposit. Please send the deposit on-chain, then paste the transaction hash below.
modal.depositWallets: Deposit wallets: sqrdao.eth (EVM) or sqrdao.sol (Solana). Use the appropriate network for your wallet.
modal.parkingFeeRequirement: Parking fee is 100,000 VND per event, to be paid to the security guard directly in cash or bank transfer.
modal.depositTxHashPlaceholder: Paste your deposit transaction hash (required if capacity > 30)
modal.depositTxHashHint: We only use this hash to verify your deposit; it will not be shared publicly.

form.name: Name
form.capacityHint: Event Space (Main Hall) can host up to {{max}} attendees per event booking

modal.title: Create Event Request
modal.description: Submit your event for approval. Once approved by an admin, it will appear on the calendar.
modal.guidelinesPrefix: I have read and understood the
modal.guidelinesHint: You must accept the Event Guidelines before filling out the form.
modal.bannerHint: Required. JPG, PNG or WebP. Max 5MB.
modal.capacityHint: Maximum capacity is {{max}} people for event requests (Main Hall)
modal.hostingProjectsHint: Enter the name(s) of the project(s) hosting this event
modal.eventLinkHint: Optional. Add a link to your event page (e.g. Lu.ma, Eventbrite)
modal.hallRequirementsItem: Parking fee is required for each event booking.
modal.parkingFeeRequirement: Parking fee is 100,000 VND per event, to be paid to the security guard directly in cash or bank transfer.
modal.depositSectionDescription: Events with more than 30 attendees require a deposit. Please send the deposit on-chain, then paste the transaction hash below.
modal.depositWallets: Deposit wallets: sqrdao.eth (EVM) or sqrdao.sol (Solana). Use the appropriate network for your wallet.
modal.depositTxHashPlaceholder: Paste your deposit transaction hash (required if capacity > 30)
modal.depositTxHashHint: We only use this hash to verify your deposit; it will not be shared publicly.
